name: Samer Alkhodary
title: AI-First Engineer | Automations & Productivity
tagline: Building AI-powered automations and productivity tools with security & safety by design. Specializing in intelligent agents, plugins, and MCPs.
bio: Software engineer with 5+ years at Qlik, pioneering AI-first solutions that amplify human productivity. I architect AI agents, automations, and extensible systems (plugins, MCPs) that solve real problems—always with security and safety as first-class concerns.
bio2: My expertise spans backend infrastructure, scalable systems, and cutting-edge AI/ML. I believe the future is AI-augmented workflows: intelligent tools that enhance human capability while maintaining trust, security, and control.
